settings.title: Settings
settings.mcpHint: Limits idle disconnect and concurrency for Agent SSH via MCP.
settings.mcpRegisterHint: Writes NodeShell into each Agent’s user-global MCP config without removing other servers. Requires Node.js on PATH; the installer ships the MCP launcher (no separate build).

about.title: About NodeShell
about.tagline: Desktop SSH client with terminal, SFTP, monitor, and MCP.
about.author: Author
about.licenseNote: Released as open source under the MIT License.
